case_title: REBECCA PEARSON VS. MALCOLM HENRY BOWLES

docket_entries.description: RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM (SMALL CLAIMS) [HEARING 03/22/24 AT 01:30 PM] (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEARSON, REBECCA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-22-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-29-2024 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF REBECCA PEARSON IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT MALCOLM HENRY BOWLES IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF CLAIMS THE DEFENDANT WAS SERVED IN JANUARY BUT THE PROOF OF SERVICE HAS NOT YET BEEN FILED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED.
